shape_semantics: Joint-necessity. code over (cmp,vp,vpc,naive) = L,L,W,L: ONLY value_profile_cmplog resolves; cmplog, value_profile, and naive all block. Every branch carries TWO Pass-A signatures of ONE joint mechanism: an h0 (vpc>value_profile, attributed to I2S => I2S necessary) and an h1 (vpc>cmplog, attributed to CMP_MAP gradient => value_profile necessary). The shape itself (Layer 1) already asserts both techniques are jointly required; the evidence test does NOT re-confirm jointness (that would violate G2 by verifying vpc-resolves with vpc-resolves). Instead it discriminates WHICH joint subtype each branch is, on a measurement INDEPENDENT of the resolve pattern: it reads the structural/value content of the cmplog-BLOCKING and value_profile-BLOCKING seed sets and asks what the gradient adds OVER I2S-only (cmplog), and what I2S adds OVER gradient-only (value_profile).

hypotheses.label: vpc assembles a LARGER, multi-field structure than I2S-only (cmplog) ever reaches; the gradient is necessary to grow size/token-count past where exact substitution stalls, and I2S is necessary because the gradient alone (value_profile) places ~0 structural tokens
hypotheses.prediction: On the value_profile-BLOCKING seed set the structural-token count is ~0 (vp_tags ~ 0): the gradient alone cannot place ANY exact multi-byte structural token, so I2S is necessary. AND the vpc-RESOLVING median seed is materially BIGGER than the cmplog-BLOCKING median seed (size_lift >= 1.3): the gradient grows the structure past where exact-substitution-only (cmplog) plateaus, so the gradient is necessary. A pure-I2S-substitution mechanism (no assembly depth) would predict size_lift ~ 1.0 (vpc and cmplog reach the SAME-sized structure, cmplog just hasn't placed the one tag yet); a pure-gradient mechanism would predict vp_tags > 0 (the gradient could place tokens on its own). Only the assembly-depth joint predicts BOTH vp_tags~0 AND size_lift>=1.3.

hypotheses.label: vpc and cmplog reach a SIMILARLY-sized structure (size_lift ~ 1, sometimes vpc smaller), but vpc places a specific gradient-climbed VALUE that the cmplog-blocking seeds approach yet never reach; I2S is still necessary to place the surrounding exact literal(s), and the gradient is necessary for the last-mile value precision the structural proxy is blind to

params.comment: NEW descriptor (not yet built). For the branch's decisive CMP site, take the target operand value (operand_literal from the signature, e.g. 0x00020000 for harfbuzz/5609-5616, the 'loca'/'post' tag for 5440/5442, the interned name3 string for libxml2/6414, the chained language/script tag for 6214/6223). Compute the MINIMUM byte-distance (Hamming over the operand-width window, or edit/prefix distance for variable-length string operands) between the target value and the value found at the cmp-site offset across (a) the vpc-RESOLVING seed set => vpc_min_distance and (b) the cmplog-BLOCKING seed set => cmp_min_distance. distance_closure_ratio = (cmp_min_distance - vpc_min_distance) / max(cmp_min_distance, 1).
params.operand_source: signature.operand_literal / operand_width_bytes; cmp-site offset from the per-role coverage overlay or the analysis byte-diff (the W-vs-L divergent offset)
params.feasibility: value-precision tool NOT yet built (registry_tool null) -> orchestrator must build + register before this hypothesis can score. Seed sets exist only for harfbuzz + libxml2 here (both on-disk-corpus / 286-rep targets), so all members are scorable once built.

hypotheses.prediction: Structures are the SAME size (size_lift ~ 1.0, the assembly-depth proxy is blind here) BUT the vpc-resolving seeds reach a value strictly CLOSER to the target operand than the cmplog-blocking seeds ever do: cmp_min_distance > 0 (cmplog seeds approach but never hit the exact value) while vpc_min_distance ~ 0 (vpc lands it), so distance_closure_ratio is large. A pure-I2S mechanism would predict cmp_min_distance ~ 0 too (cmplog HAS I2S, so if a single substitution sufficed cmplog would also reach the value and resolve -- contradicting the L label); the fact that cmplog approaches-but-misses is exactly what the gradient (value_profile) supplies. This rules out 'I2S alone is enough' AND, because size_lift~1, rules out the assembly-depth story.

notes: COLLAPSE / MERGE record: 23 branches = 46 signatures (h0=I2S-necessary, h1=VP-necessary per branch). The shape's joint-necessity is asserted by Layer 1; jointness is NOT re-tested (G2 -- would 'verify vpc-resolves with vpc-resolves'). The only discriminable question the data supports is the joint SUBTYPE, of which the empirical harfbuzz run established exactly two (assembly-depth 7/22, value-precision 15/22). I therefore collapsed the THREE prior-hint clusters into these two subtypes rather than keeping them: (1) vpc_font_table_tag_structural_joint_gate (font sfnt/table-directory FOURCC assembly) and (2) vpc_icc_multistep_colorspace_fourcc_gate (lcms multi-field colorspace/PCS chains) are NOT discriminable from each other by any real-data measurement -- both are 'gradient grows a multi-field structure past I2S-only', measured identically by joint_necessity (only the --tokens vocabulary differs by target, which is a param, not a different test) -- so they FOLD into joint_assembly_depth. (3) vpc_string_token_chained_comparison_joint_gate (single exact value/string the gradient climbs toward: the 0x00020000 version integers 5609/5614/5616, the single 'loca'/'post' tag 5440/5442, the interned name3 string 6414, the chained language/script-tag lookups 6214/6223) is genuinely SEPARABLE -- its hallmark is size_lift~1 with a value-distance gap the size proxy cannot see -- so it stays as joint_value_precision with its OWN (new) descriptor. TARGET DISTRIBUTION: harfbuzz 14, lcms 6, libxml2 3. --tokens is font-specific; lcms needs ICC FOURCCs (acsp/spac/prtr/link/abst/mntr/colorspace sigs) and libxml2 needs XML structural literals (<?xml,<!DOCTYPE,<![CDATA[,xmlns,...), supplied per-target in params.tokens_by_target. CAVEATS / FEASIBILITY: (a) joint_value_precision's descriptor is NOT built yet (registry_tool null) -- orchestrator must build value_distance_reached before it can score; assembly_depth reuses the validated joint_necessity tool as-is. (b) DATA-REALITY compliance: NO seed_lineage 'I2S event' is used (untagged); NO byte-alignment/byte_freq_ratio is used (joint gates have different-SIZED W vs L seeds -- the spec's own warning), instead struct_size/token_count and value_distance. (c) on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -- of this shape's targets only harfbuzz has on-disk corpus, but lcms+libxml2 are among the 286 reps with resolving_seeds+blocking_seeds in the DB, which is what both descriptors consume (seed_set source, not corpus_queue), so all 23 branches are scorable once the value-precision tool is built. (d) member_hint_branches are my best a-priori split from gate_structure; they are HINTS for the orchestrator/arbiter, NOT labels -- the deterministic rule over the named metrics makes the actual per-branch call. decision_order tries assembly_depth first because its vp_tags<0.3 AND size_lift>=1.3 conjunction is the more specific (harder-to-accidentally-satisfy) rule; anything failing it falls through to the value-precision rule, and a branch matching NEITHER (e.g. size_lift>=1.3 but vp_tags>0.3, or size_lift<1.3 but no value-distance gap) is honestly left inconclusive rather than force-fit.
